query: SELECT productId, LEFT(productName, 60) as name, listingType, mlItemId, status, LEFT(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(baselinkerResponse, '$.mlItemId')), 20) as respItemId FROM export_logs WHERE status = 'success' LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Zv4Qvr7xnDv85L.fd0c5f77ba12 --database nQNUJejXd53raznAt7q8o4 --execute SELECT productId, LEFT(productName, 60) as name, listingType, mlItemId, status, LEFT(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(baselinkerResponse, '$.mlItemId')), 20) as respItemId FROM export_logs WHERE status = 'success' LIMIT 5;
